title: thymus angustifolius
intro: Thymus angustifolius, also known as red thyme or narrow-leaved thyme, is a low-growing, perennial shrub native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which help to combat infections and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Thymus angustifolius include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and support respiratory health. Thymus angustifolius can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or oil, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
